bench.yml/exec-guard-bench.github_only_reason: optional exec-guard microbenchmark lane; it builds the cdylib and times the LD_PRELOAD shim's classification overhead on Linux, which the macOS host baseline cannot mirror, so the reviewed numbers come from this scheduled/on-demand GitHub lane

ci-insights.yml/cost-report.github_only_reason: scheduled read-only CI cost-visibility report; it aggregates per-workflow wall-clock from the GitHub Actions run history via the runs API and writes to the job summary, so it depends on GitHub-hosted run metadata and never gates a PR or release

ci-insights.yml/flaky-report.github_only_reason: scheduled read-only flake report; it reads GitHub-hosted workflow-run history and the tracked flaky-test issue list to surface flake candidates in the job summary, so it depends on GitHub-hosted metadata and never gates a PR or release

ci.yml/install-verification[runner=macos.github_only_reason: exact hosted macOS install verification remains GitHub-only
exact hosted macOS install verification remains GitHub-only

codeql.yml/analyze[build-mode=autobuild,.github_only_reason: CodeQL requires GitHub-hosted scanning and upload permissions

codeql.yml/analyze[build-mode=none,langu.github_only_reason: CodeQL requires GitHub-hosted scanning and upload permissions
CodeQL requires GitHub-hosted scanning and upload permissions

fuzz.yml/fuzz.github_only_reason: scheduled heavy Go fuzzing sweep; the fuzz targets and their seed corpora already run as regression tests locally and in every PR via go test, while the extended time-bounded mutation budget runs on a weekly GitHub cadence

fuzz.yml/rust-fuzz.github_only_reason: scheduled heavy Rust cargo-fuzz sweep of the exec-guard classifiers; needs the nightly libFuzzer toolchain and a time-bounded mutation budget, so it runs on the weekly GitHub cadence rather than the PR path

hosted-controls.yml/verify-hosted-contro.github_only_reason: hosted controls require GitHub-hosted policy state and token-backed audit access

mutation.yml/mutation.github_only_reason: scheduled heavy mutation-harness lane run in the validator image; approved-heavy-ci PR runs are surfaced in pr-parity plans, and the mutation-score gate already runs locally in the release-preflight validate profile

release.yml/build-arm64-image.github_only_reason: native arm64 release image build and GHCR push remain GitHub-only and gated on the release environment

release.yml/install-verification[runner=.github_only_reason: release install verification uses exact hosted macOS runners
release install verification uses exact hosted macOS runners

release.yml/preflight.github_only_reason: release preflight binds hosted controls, artifacts, and release-only permissions

release.yml/preflight-amd64-repro.github_only_reason: release reproducibility verification of the amd64 image binds release-only artifacts in a parallel preflight job

release.yml/preflight-arm64-repro.github_only_reason: release reproducibility verification of the native arm64 image binds release-only artifacts and runs on a native arm64 runner

release.yml/preflight-arm64-copilot-runt.github_only_reason: release Copilot runtime-image verification runs on the native arm64 hosted runner with release preflight token-file wiring

release.yml/preflight-container-smoke.github_only_reason: release container smoke runs in a parallel preflight job and gates publication; mirrored locally by ci.yml/container-smoke

scorecard.yml/analysis.github_only_reason: Scorecard requires GitHub-hosted metadata and SARIF upload paths

security.yml/dependency-review.github_only_reason: dependency review requires GitHub advisory services

upstream-refresh.yml/refresh.github_only_reason: upstream refresh candidate generation depends on GitHub-hosted scheduling, artifacts, and issue publication
